figures.caption: Figure 1: Illustration of the gradient correction rule.
Table 1: Overall performance evaluation of graph federated unlearning. The percentage next to the dataset name indicates the model accuracy achieved by FedAvg without unlearning.

Figure 2: Unlearning evaluation and model accuracy are measured using four datasets: Cora, CiteSeer, PubMed, and Tolokers. The bar charts represent Model Accuracy, where higher performance is better; the line charts represent the Mia Rate, where lower values indicate higher unlearning levels.
Figure 3: Precision curves, MIA member recognition rates, and their standard deviation bands for different τ values on the Cora, CiteSeer, PubMed, and Tolokers datasets.
